basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIREH Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute for Research in Environmental Health (ICMR NIREH)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute for Research in Environmental Health (ICMR NIREH) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 10-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR guidelines for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences, Graduation Degree in Professional Courses
qualification.details: Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences or Graduation Degree in Professional Courses.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR NIREH Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR NIREH JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at ICMR NIREH is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences or a Graduation Degree in Professional Courses to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 20,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICMR NIREH JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application with all necessary documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by an interview, which may be conducted via Walk-In-Interview or Video Conferencing.

faq.question: Q8. Where is ICMR NIREH located?
faq.answer: ICMR NIREH is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462030.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
